task.title: Register a Plugin
task.shortdesc: Register and install your plugin so the platform can discover it through entry points.

prereq.p: Create a plugin package with pyproject.toml and a plugin instance or plugin class.
For first-time plugin onboarding, validate and inspect plugin metadata before running any package migration.

step.cmd: Add a plugin entry-point declaration to pyproject.toml.
Install the plugin package into the runtime environment.

info.codeblock: python3 -m dita_package_processor plugin list python3 -m dita_package_processor plugin info com.acme.dita_migration

step.cmd: Run a fixture migration and inspect emitted action types and outcomes.

result.p: Your plugin is registered in the active environment and participates in discovery, planning, and execution according to its implemented extension points.
result.codeblock: plugin list includes your plugin name plugin info shows expected pattern and handler counts migration plan includes plugin-driven action types or routes
